# Generated All-In Podcast Search Data

This directory is generated by the local build pipeline.

## Do not edit by hand

- `data/all-in-podcast-search/episodes/index.json`
- `data/all-in-podcast-search/episodes/*.json`

These files are rewritten by:

```bash
npm run build:all-in-podcast-search
```

If you want to refresh the archive, update `scripts/podcasts/all-in/raw/archive/feed.xml` via:

```bash
npm run fetch:all-in-podcast-archive
```

If you want to add or fix transcript data for a specific episode, update the transcript override files in `scripts/podcasts/all-in/raw/transcripts/` and rebuild.
